title: Publication
description: An IBO publication — the core reference object and IBO's actual product: a Report, Testimony, Letter, Budget Options analysis, Explainer, Interactive, or Dataset. Canonical schema reconciling the NYC.gov Content API v2 record (apps.nyc.gov/content-api/v2/custom-contents/ibo/IBO-Publications), which today exposes ~1,145 publications with structured metadata but no documented contract. Covers the entity hints BudgetReport / Analysis / FiscalBrief.

author.description: Authoring IBO team ('Author', e.g. 'IBO Education Team').

format.description: Delivery format ('Format') — PDF, interactive, dataset link.

webUrl.description: Fully qualified public URL on www.ibo.nyc.gov.
